resources.string: แอปมือถือ Lichess

string.name: returningToApp
string.comment: Displayed on interstitial page that automatically opens the Lichess app

resources.string: กลับไปหน้าแอป Lichess

string.name: ifAppDoesNotOpenAutomatically
string.comment:
ifAppDoesNotOpenAutomatically
%s is "Open the Lichess App", which is translatable separately.

resources.string: ถ้าแอปไม่เปิดขึ้นโดยอัตโนมัติ ให้กดปุ่ม \"%s\"

string.name: openTheApp
string.comment: Button text to open the Lichess app on the device

string.name: allReleases
string.comment:
Part of longer text "View [all releases] on GitHub"
Links to https://github.com/lichess-org/mobile/releases - a list of all mobile app releases

resources.string: เผยเเพร่ทั้งหมดแล้ว

string.name: downloadOnAppleAppStore
string.comment: Alt text for Apple App Store download link/image on https://lichess.org/app

resources.string: ดาวน์โหลดบน App Store ของ Apple

string.name: downloadOnGooglePlay
string.comment: Alt text for Google Play download link/image on https://lichess.org/app

resources.string: ดาวน์โหลดบน Google Play

string.name: downloadOnFdroid
string.comment: Alt text for F-Droid download link/image on https://lichess.org/app

resources.string: ดาวน์โหลดบน F-Droid

string.name: lichessMobileScreen
string.comment: Alt text for screenshot of the Lichess mobile app

resources.string: หน้าจอมือถือ Lichess
